requirements.task_name: Favorite three English commercial voiceover demos under 30 seconds
requirements.task_description: Filter to English commercial demos under 30 seconds and add the first three results to Favorites.

required_variables.set_condition: On every invocation of searchVoiceoverDemos, after all filtering/sorting parameters are resolved but before the function returns the paginated results.
required_variables.value_to_set: An object capturing the last search parameters, e.g. { category, languages, min_duration_seconds, max_duration_seconds, min_average_rating, style, tags, sort_by, page, page_size } constructed from the function arguments.
required_variables.reason: Allows the evaluator to re-run the same search via BusinessLogic and verify that the user performed a search with category='commercial', languages containing only English, and max_duration_seconds <= 30, then check that the three demos added to favorite_voiceover_demos correspond to the first three results of that filtered list.

requirements.task_name: Select the higher-rated character voice demo with at least 10 reviews
requirements.task_description: Filter character voice demos, compare the first two qualifying demos (rating ≥ 4.5 and 10+ reviews), and add the higher-rated one to the project shortlist.

required_variables.set_condition: On every invocation of searchVoiceoverDemos, after filtering and sorting have been determined but before slicing for pagination.
required_variables.value_to_set: An object with the search parameters: { category, languages, min_duration_seconds, max_duration_seconds, min_average_rating, style, tags, sort_by, page, page_size } derived from the function arguments.
required_variables.reason: Enables the evaluator to re-run the same search and confirm that the user used category='character', style='video_game_animation', min_average_rating >= 4.5, and sort_by='rating_desc' (Rating – High to Low), which is required for the task.

required_variables.set_condition: Each time getVoiceoverDemoDetail(demoId) is called, append the demoId to an array stored in localStorage (if not already present). If the array does not yet exist, create it with the first demoId.
required_variables.value_to_set: JSON-serialized array of unique demo IDs viewed in detail, e.g. ['demo_123', 'demo_456', ...].
required_variables.reason: Lets the evaluator see which demos the user actually opened for comparison. Combined with task2_filterParams and the underlying data, this allows verification that the first two IDs in task2_comparedDemoIds are the first two demos with a '10+ reviews' badge in the correctly filtered, rating-desc-sorted result set, and that the demo added to the project shortlist is the higher-rated (or, on tie, longer-duration) of those two.

requirements.task_name: Add two recent drama acting showreels to a casting list
requirements.task_description: Filter to drama showreels filmed in 2019+ with duration ≥ 1 minute, sorted by Most Recent, then add two different showreels to the Casting List.

required_variables.set_condition: On every invocation of searchShowreels, after applying filters and sorting but before pagination slicing.
required_variables.value_to_set: An object holding the search parameters: { genre, min_year, max_year, min_duration_seconds, max_duration_seconds, sort_by, page, page_size } derived from the function arguments.
required_variables.reason: Allows the evaluator to re-run searchShowreels with exactly these parameters to confirm that the user searched for drama showreels filmed in 2019 or later with duration ≥ 60 seconds sorted by 'most_recent', and that the showreels added to casting_list_items correspond to two distinct items from the top of that filtered list.

requirements.task_name: Request a quote for a 60-second online ad that stays within a $600 budget
requirements.task_description: Configure a 60-second online ad voiceover in the rate calculator, adjust usage duration if needed so the estimate is ≤ $600, then send this configuration via the inquiry form.

requirements.task_name: Submit a booking request for a 2-hour directed remote session on a specific date
requirements.task_description: Submit a booking request for a 2-hour directed remote recording session on April 15, 2026 at 10:00 AM in America/New_York with two preferred connection methods.

requirements.task_name: Save three recent advertising-agency testimonials to your favorite clients list
requirements.task_description: Filter testimonials to advertising/marketing agencies from 2022 onward, add three to Favorite Clients, then sort favorites by company name A–Z.

required_variables.set_condition: On every invocation of searchTestimonials, after filters/sort are applied but before pagination slicing.
required_variables.value_to_set: An object capturing testimonial search parameters: { client_type, min_year, max_year, sort_by, page, page_size } derived from the function arguments.
required_variables.reason: Allows the evaluator to re-run searchTestimonials with these parameters to confirm that the user filtered to client_type='advertising_marketing_agency' and min_year >= 2022 before selecting clients to favorite, and that the three favorite_clients correspond to the first three testimonials from that filtered result.

required_variables.set_condition: Each time getFavoriteClients(sort_by) is called, after the sort operation is applied.
required_variables.value_to_set: The effective sort key used for that call, e.g. sort_by if provided, otherwise the default 'company_name_asc'.
required_variables.reason: Enables the evaluator to check that the Favorites view was last requested with sort_by='company_name_asc', corresponding to the 'Sort by Company Name (A–Z)' action in the task.

requirements.task_name: Create a project plan with combined services totaling no more than 3 recording hours
requirements.task_description: Use the Project Planner to combine a commercial voiceover service and an on-camera self-tape service, adjust if necessary to keep total duration ≤ 3 hours, then save the plan.

requirements.task_name: Subscribe to monthly updates focused on commercial voiceover, animation, and drama acting
requirements.task_description: Subscribe to the newsletter with a specific email, three interests, monthly summary frequency only, and casting availability updates enabled.
